description: Gigabyte GeForce GTX 1660 Super OC 6GB Graphics Card | Used What is Gigabyte GeForce GTX 1660 Super OC 6GB Graphics Card | Used price in Pakistan? Gigabyte GeForce GTX 1660 Super OC 6GB Graphics Card | Used price in Pakistan is Rs.44,000. It features 1408 CUDA cores with an OC core clock up to 1860 MHz and 6 GB GDDR6 memory on a 192-bit bus for smooth 1080p gaming performance. Built on PCIe 3.0 with multiple DisplayPort 1.4 and HDMI 2.0b outputs, it supports up to four displays and 4K resolution
